edge_hypothesis: ema_rsi_atr is 'stagnant' at PF=1.033/389 trades with DEFAULT parameters (RSI 40-70 long, 30-60 short). The wide RSI band means the template fires on nearly any EMA_9>EMA_21 alignment with above-average ATR — it's too permissive. By TIGHTENING RSI bands to 50-65 (longs) and 35-50 (shorts), we filter for momentum-continuation setups only: RSI above 50 confirms bullish momentum (not just absence of oversold), while the 65 cap prevents chasing overbought. This transforms the template from a 'trend alignment + any RSI' signal into a 'momentum confirmation within established trend' signal. The ATR gate (ATR > 20-SMA) already filters for volatile conditions — combined with tighter RSI, this selects for high-conviction trending momentum. Trade count will drop from 389 to an estimated 150-200, which is still well above the 20-trade gate. Advisory notes ranging PF=1.115 on ETH/1h — testing on 1h with one variant to explore the timeframe dimension. Regime assumption: TRENDING (EMA alignment + RSI momentum + ATR expansion). Invalidation: if tightened RSI bands produce PF < 1.05 or trade count < 50, the template genuinely lacks signal quality and should be permanently deprioritized.

variants.name: ema_rsi_momentum_continuation_4h
variants.description: ema_rsi_atr with tightened RSI bands (50-65 long, 35-50 short) on ETH/4h. RSI > 50 confirms bullish momentum is active, < 65 avoids chasing. Combined with EMA_9 > EMA_21 and ATR > MA20 volatility gate, this selects for the strongest momentum-continuation setups. Stop at 2.0x ATR (safe floor), TP at 3.5x ATR (1.75:1 R:R — moderate to match signal quality level between MACD and plain EMA crossover). The tighter bands should eliminate the weakest 40-50% of the default template's signals.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms short-term uptrend alignment.
RSI_14 between 50 and 65 (momentum confirmed but not overbought).
ATR_14 > 20-period SMA of ATR (volatility expansion gate).
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms short-term downtrend alignment.
RSI_14 between 35 and 50 (momentum confirmed but not oversold).
ATR_14 > 20-period SMA of ATR (volatility expansion gate).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Volatility gate: ATR_14 > 20-period average (built into template)
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: if trade count drops below 80 with tightened bands, RSI range is too restrictive
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: RSI_14 tightened to 50-65 (long) / 35-50 (short) for momentum confirmation

variants.name: ema_rsi_ranging_1h_explorer
variants.description: ema_rsi_atr on ETH/1h timeframe to test the advisory's observation that ranging PF=1.115 on 1h. The ATR volatility gate on 1h may capture different market microstructure — shorter-term volatility expansions that resolve faster. RSI bands kept at default-ish (45-65 long, 35-55 short — slightly tightened from default 40-70/30-60) because 1h produces more signals and we don't want to over-filter. Stop at 1.5x ATR (tighter on 1h because ATR is smaller in absolute terms), TP at 2.5x (1.67:1 R:R). If this produces PF > 1.1 with 200+ trades, it validates 1h as a viable timeframe for ema_rsi_atr.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms short-term uptrend alignment.
RSI_14 between 45 and 65 (slightly tightened momentum band).
ATR_14 > 20-period SMA of ATR (volatility expansion gate).
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms short-term downtrend alignment.
RSI_14 between 35 and 55 (slightly tightened momentum band).
ATR_14 > 20-period SMA of ATR (volatility expansion gate).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Volatility gate: ATR_14 > 20-period average (built into template)
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 1h may produce too many trades (>500) with marginal PF — check if per-trade edge survives fees
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: ATR_14 volatility gate + 1.67:1 R:R for 1h timeframe

variants.name: ema_rsi_strict_momentum_4h
variants.description: The strictest RSI filter variant: RSI 55-62 (longs only when momentum is clearly bullish), RSI 38-45 (shorts only when momentum is clearly bearish). This narrows the signal window dramatically — estimated 80-120 trades vs 389 at defaults. The hypothesis: the ema_rsi_atr template's stagnation at PF=1.033 is because 70% of its signals are noise (RSI 40-50 = no clear momentum). By requiring RSI to confirm active directional momentum, every surviving signal has higher conviction. Combined with widest safe stops (2.5x ATR) and wide TP (4.0x, 1.6:1 R:R), this is the quality-over-quantity variant.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms short-term uptrend alignment.
RSI_14 between 55 and 62 (strict bullish momentum — above 50 midline, below overbought).
ATR_14 > 20-period SMA of ATR (volatility expansion gate).
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms short-term downtrend alignment.
RSI_14 between 38 and 45 (strict bearish momentum — below 50 midline, above oversold).
ATR_14 > 20-period SMA of ATR (volatility expansion gate).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Volatility gate: ATR_14 > 20-period average (built into template)
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: strict RSI may drop trades below 50 — if so, slightly widen bands to 52-65
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: RSI_14 strict momentum bands (55-62 long / 38-45 short) — quality filter
ATR_14 volatility gate + widest safe stops (2.5x/4.0x)
